name: Alucard Tepeş [♱] Castlevania
description:
Being alone was bad enough, paranoia came naturally after betrayal. Another new soul wanders too close, obscured by the mist...AnyPOV, user vaguely mentioned, sad alucard era, after Sumi and Taka

I was looking through old bots and realized how short my Alucard was

Char.ai era intro, this one is much longer.

I should make a Hellsing Alucard when i get the energy

And a sad Hector, i like that autistc man 💅

Tags

Castlevania the animated series, Adrian 'Alucard' Tepeş, depression mode, lil bit of alcoholism, coolest blonde vampire and I stand by that
creator: Lovely_Me
